songs.title: To the mother I once loved.
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1] 
You keep a keepsake under your pillow. 
I burned everything that was once near you. 
The canyon and the grave, anything to keep you away.

You turned to prayer I turned to questions. 
You turned around and pretend I’m not here. 
The lies etched on your face, smiling while I can’t feel the same.

[Pre-Chorus] 
But I can’t wait for snow to burn.

[Chorus] 
This is my form of goodbye. 
I’m sorry that it’s not kind. 
But your dragging on my mind.

This is me saying goodbye. 
The only way I’ll survive, 
Is if I leave you behind.

[Verse 2] 
You just stood still while i screamed in fear, 
You threw the vase and I disappeared. 
The lies you tell yourself, anything to keep your demons at bay.

[pre chorus] 
But I can’t wait for snow to burn.

Chorus] 
This is my form of goodbye. 
I’m sorry that it’s not kind. 
But your dragging on my mind.

This is me saying goodbye. 
I wish that we reconciled.

I wish that we reconciled.

I wish that we reconciled.

songs.title: Alternate
songs.lyrics:
[verse 1] 
He never had to stay home with his bed frame on the door. 
His mother is angry, he’s crying down the phone. 
Never knew pain at 8 years. 
Never learned all my fears.

[pre chorus] 
I like to dream about him sometimes. 
I wonder how he’s doing just fine.

[chorus] 
He’s staying out at a friend’s house on Sunday night. 
They’re laughing ‘ bout celebrities they never really liked. 
I hope he never had to grow up, early. 
I hope he never has to become me.

[verse 2] 
He didn’t try to leave life, only 12 at the time. 
Never had to hide cuts ‘cause words weren’t crimes. 
He still loves his mother. 
And still knows his father.

[pre chorus] 
I like to dream about him sometimes. 
I wonder how he’s doing just fine.

[chorus] 
He’s staying out at a friend’s house on Sunday night. 
They’re laughing ‘ bout celebrities they never really liked. 
I hope he never had to grow up, early. 
I hope he never has to become me.

[breakdown/outro] 
He ain’t got cuts on his wrist. 
Not found under a rail bridge. 
Men don’t make him flinch.

he never has to become

And he’s ok with intimacy. 
Not scared from anxiety. 
No locks on his knife draw.

he never has to become

songs.title: Leave You As A Memory
songs.lyrics:
[verse 1]
I know you couldn’t help it,
With your circumstances.
But now all our memories,
Forever bitter.

And it was unexpected,
You’re 19 years and reckless.
But maybe you’d be better, it’s the way they treated you.

[chorus]
I sat on the floor, and I read the report.
I saw on the news, all the things you’d do.

But the kid I remember, My older brother.
The smiling parent, A hard decision.

I’ll leave you as a memory.
To save me. 

[verse 2]
We could’ve reconnected.
Had lived together.
But I can’t think about it,
It’s too painful to.

I hold onto remnants,
With me every second, 
Treasured fragments ‘cause it’s all I have of you. 

[chorus]
I sat on the floor, and I read the report.
I saw on the news, all the things you’d do.

But the kid I remember, My older brother.
The smiling parent, A hard decision.

I’ll leave you as a memory.
To save me. 

[outro]
And now you’re not here.
And I’m alone in my kitchen.
Six feet under, I wish it were different.
If you could’ve known,
Would you have changed.
Held onto me and remembered my name?

songs.title: Cut you out
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1] 
I’ve been hoping you’d renew it, 
The phone plan so we can speak. 
But it’s been nearly half a year and you still affect my sleep.

Sometimes my phone screen flickers, and I wonder if it’s you. 
Cuz despite all the screaming and the threats that I’m leaving I still love you.

[Pre-Chorus] 
I can say in hushed tones. 
I carry parts of you in my bones.

[Chorus] 
I know that it’s sadistic, 
And it’s become ritualistic. 
But I can’t stop cutting you out. 
I want all of you renounced. 
Pour the bleach on all your surface. 
Till your acrid words can’t hurt me. 
I keep cutting you out. 
Out.

[Verse 2] 
You could say I was reckless, but I’d have to disagree. 
See you hurt for 17 years and I just needed to be free.

You can search for a meaning, maybe it’s synchronicity. 
But I lied so much to preserve roadblocks, illusions all you’ll see.

[Pre-Chorus] 
I can say in hushed tones. 
I carry parts of you in my bones.

[Chorus] 
I know that it’s sadistic, 
And it’s become ritualistic. 
But I can’t stop cutting you out. 
I want all of you renounced. 
Pour the bleach on all your surface. 
Till your acrid words can’t hurt me. 
I keep cutting you out. 
Out.

[Bridge] 
So I’m grateful to you and me. 
You tainted every part of me. 
Just to push me down. 
And you still hurt me now. 

[Chorus] 
I know that it’s sadistic, 
And it’s become ritualistic. 
But I can’t stop cutting you out. 
I want all of you renounced. 
Pour the bleach on all your surface. 
Till your acrid words can’t hurt me. 
I keep cutting you out. 
Out.

songs.title: Last dream is done
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Alone in a smoke-filled
Holy ground,
You beg for disaster
To try and get out.

It’s a lonely existence;
It suffocates you.
You beg for the divine,
But it overlooked you.

[Pre-Chorus]
The seed inside you dies,
The hope that used to reside.

[Chorus]
The pressure is building,
You’re being compressed,
But you’ll always hold onto what you haven’t done yet.
The light ain’t emitting, the signal is gone,
But you refuse to die until the last dream is done.

[Verse 2]
The tempest inside you
Just wants to get out,
A sharp sideways pain that
You feel when you’re down.

It’s hard to be humble
When you’re six feet down.
You’re gasping for air, but
You can’t make a sound.

[Pre-Chorus]
The seed inside you dies,
The hope that used to reside.

[Chorus]
The pressure is building,
You’re being compressed,
But you’ll always hold onto what you haven’t done yet.
The light ain’t emitting, 
the signal is gone,
But you refuse to die until the last dream is done.

[Outro]
Sometimes I wonder
If it’s ‘cause of trauma
That I’m destined to be
A statistic on screen.
Could I really change it?
Could I really see?
Sometimes I wonder
If it’s ‘cause of trauma
That I’m destined to be
A statistic on screen.
Could I really change it?
Could I really see the last dream?

songs.title: In your verbatim
songs.lyrics:
[Intro] 
So you think you’re venerated?

[Verse 1] 
The weight of your delusion. 
Your son is fine, your son is dying, 
All alone on his bedroom floor. 
You stand on principle, while he is miserable.

[Pre-Chorus] 
Are you remorseful? 
Our relationship’s tarnished. 
Are you peaceful 
In your family alliance.

[Chorus] 
I was devoted. 
I idolised you. 
The tension broke me. 
Not so apprehensive. 
I’d crucify you 
In your verbatim.

[Verse 2] 
You call it heresy 
When my mouth is open, 
My lungs will be empty, 
When your words condemn you. 

[Pre-Chorus] 
Are you remorseful? 
Our relationship’s tarnished. 
Are you peaceful 
In your family alliance.

[Chorus] 
I was devoted. 
I idolised you. 
The tension broke me. 
Not so apprehensive. 
I’d crucify you 
In your verbatim.

[Bridge] 
So you think you’re venerated? 
Your love was nebulous. 
My freedom’s resurrected. 
Your care was turbulent.

So you think you’re venerated? 
You’re not so messianic. 
Not my blood-tether
Not my communion.

[Chorus] 
I was devoted. 
I idolised you. 
The tension broke me. 
Not so apprehensive. 
I’d crucify you 
In your verbatim.

[Outro] 
So you think you’re venerated? 
Your love was nebulous. 
I’d crucify you 
In your verbatim.

So you think you’re venerated? 
You’re not so messianic. 
I’d crucify you 
In your verbatim.

songs.title: If only I could be a better friend
songs.lyrics:
[chorus]
Maybe if I loved you more.
It could stop the damage.
Maybe if I called someone.
They could be the bandage.
I know that I’ll never heal.
And I never want to.
If only I could-

[verse 1]
1 year but no reduction,
In the loss that I’m feeling.
Was it supposed to happen?
Or was it accidental.

I never heard anything,
No calls and no doctors
Just your name slowly fading.
Leaving me with assumptions.

[pre chorus]
I know your life was rough, I never knew how much.
Your meds your cat your daughters and your drugs. 

[chorus]
Maybe if I loved you more.
It could stop the damage.
Maybe if I called someone.
They could be the bandage.
I know that I’ll never heal.
And I never want to.
If only I could-

[verse 2]
I know all the statistics,
I really wish I didn’t.
Maybe your the outlier,
Maybe your mates are lying.

[pre chorus 2]
I get it’s dumb but maybe your not gone.
My hopes, my heart, tell me I’m wrong. 

[chorus]
Maybe if I loved you more.
It could stop the damage.
Maybe if I called someone.
They could be the bandage.
I know that I’ll never heal.
And I never want to.
If only I could-

songs.title: Draw a line
songs.lyrics:
[verse 1]
I draw a line every time I think of what you’ve done to me,
A line, as red as wine, doesn’t hurt like you hurt me.
And time, is supposed to heal. 
But my mind refuses that feeling.

[chorus]
Collateral damage from maternity. 
A holy mother, creates a tragedy.
If you beat me, if you choked me, I could point at all the scars.
But your words the worse weapon ‘cause they never leave a mark. 

I draw a line. 
Onto my skin.
A painful sting.
Is what you left me with. 

[verse 2]
I draw a line, blocked your number and severed you from me.
I think it’s time, I try and deal, with reality.
Your love was cruel, your love was cold, and it ruined me. 
I think it’s time, I say I’m fine, 
and drown in my feelings.

[chorus]
Collateral damage from maternity. 
A holy mother, creates a tragedy.
If you beat me, if you choked me, I could point at all the scars.
But your words the worse weapon ‘cause they never leave a mark. 

I draw a line. 
Onto my skin.
A painful sting.
Is what you left me with. 

I draw a line.
And I dive in.
Let your hate leak out this broken skin.

songs.title: Drive
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I'm on this road alone tonight
City lights blur reflective signs
Every red light reminds me of you
Away from the fog in the rearview
I look for you from the passenger seat
I look to the stars and you're all I see

[Chorus]
And as you drive tonight
Will you consider me
As the lights fly by
Will you picture me
And as you drive tonight
Will you envisage me
As the lights fly by
Will you think of me

[Verse 2]
Radio's playing our favorite song
It's been so long but I sing along
Every red light brings me back to you
Away from the storm clouds in the rearview
I look for you from the passenger seat
I look to the stars and you're all I see

[Chorus]
And as you drive tonight
Will you consider me
As the lights fly by
Will you picture me
And as you drive tonight
Will you envisage me
As the lights fly by
Will you think of me

[Bridge]
Streetlights flicker tracing the line
But all I see is your face with mine
Through boundless night through limitless miles
I wonder if you can remember my smile

[Chorus]
And as you drive tonight
Will you consider me
As the lights fly by
Will you picture me
And as you drive tonight
Will you envisage me
As the lights fly by
Will you think of me
As you drive tonight

songs.title: End Of It All
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
What if you held me just tonight
And I'd smile cuz you seem alright
And we'd both be safe despite the war
What if you let me for a time be small

[Pre-Chorus]
Would it all fade
If I just let go
Would it be safe
If I hesitate

[Chorus]
At the end of it all where will we fall
If I lost my grip please don't let go
At the end of it all will we still belong
At the end of the line will we lose it all

[Verse 2]
What if you kissed me just one more time
And I'd wipe away the tears in your eyes
And we'd pause it just before goodbye
What if you let me for a time be fine

[Pre-Chorus]
Would it all fade
If I just let go
Would it be safe
If I hesitate

[Chorus]
At the end of it all where will we fall
If I lost my grip please don't let go
At the end of it all will we still belong
At the end of the line will we lose it all

[Bridge]
Our time is coming next stop is ours
Just one last moment beneath our stars
Our time is running low we can't depart
Just one last look at you still in my heart

[Chorus]
At the end of it all where will we fall
If I lost my grip please don't let go
At the end of it all will we still belong
At the end of the line will we lose it all

At the end of it all where will we fall
If I lost my grip please don't let go
At the end of it all will we still belong
At the end of the line will we lose it all

songs.title: Ghosts Again
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
The sky was burning our hearts went cold
We watched it break as the night took hold
You reached for me but you slipped away
A ghost in the dark where you used to stay
And every word we left unsaid
Haunting the halls inside my head
We're shadows now flickers of pain
I guess we are ghosts again

[Chorus]
We haunt the streets we used to run
The lights go out we come undone
We're the acid in the rain
Not alive ghosts again
Fading crawling lost in the night
Chasing a flame that's lost its light
We're the ruin the bitter end
Here we stand ghosts again

[Verse 2]
I hear your voice through the tangled wires
Whispers buried in electric fires
We built a dream just to watch it die
Now we're left in the smoke asking why
The pieces fall but they never fit
Stuck in the cracks deep in a rift
We're shattered glass in the wind
I guess we are ghosts again

[Chorus]
We haunt the streets we used to run
The lights go out we come undone
We're the acid in the rain
Not alive ghosts again
Fading crawling lost in the night
Chasing a flame that's lost its light
We're the ruin the bitter end
Here we stand ghosts again

[Bridge]
The world spins on but we stand still
Tied to a dream we can't kill
We're broken now but what's left to save
Our bodies gone haunting the grave

[Chorus]
We haunt the streets we used to run
The lights go out we come undone
We're the acid in the rain
Not alive ghosts again
Fading crawling lost in the night
Chasing a flame that's lost its light
We're the ruin the bitter end
Here we stand ghosts again

[Outro]
In the end we're ghosts again
In the dark we pretend
But when it's light we're ghosts again
In the end we're ghosts again

songs.title: How It Feels
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Rocket in the night take me far away
And I'll orbit
Out past Neptune where they don't dare go
But I still go

[Pre-Chorus]
I can't help but feel a needing
Crown me god of the ones they're leaving
I can't help but feel it bleeding
Make me the god make me a god

[Chorus]
When I close my eyes feel a spark of life
I wonder how it would feel how it would feel
Take me out this world take me from this time
I wonder how it would feel how it would feel

[Verse 2]
Blast me off to a world of my own
Stone throne sitting
Craters in my chest where belief used to linger
No sun no light

[Pre-Chorus]
I can't help but feel a needing
Crown me god of the ones they're leaving
I can't help but feel it bleeding
Make me the god make me a god

[Chorus]
When I close my eyes feel a spark of life
I wonder how it would feel how it would feel
Take me out this world take me from this time
I wonder how it would feel how it would feel

When I close my eyes feel a spark of life
I wonder how it would feel how it would feel
Take me out this world take me from this time
I wonder how it would feel how it would feel

[Outro]
When I close my eyes I ignite inside
Now I know how it feels how it feels
I don't need your world I don't need your time
Now I know how it feels how it feels

songs.title: Oceans On Fire
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I dream in greyscale
You drift through pastel light
I speak in motion
You speak in lullabies

[Break]
Frequencies eroding something that was once divine

[Chorus]
Drowning water with flame
Can we exist without a frame
You say I'm wrong but we're both to blame
Was it always a mistake
All structure was defiled
Can we re blur that line
Tides rise make wildfires
We set the ocean on fire
We set the ocean on fire
We set the ocean on fire

[Verse 2]
I read the warning
You danced around the signs
I felt the burning
You said you felt alight

[Break]
Molecules shift now matter's learning how to cry

[Chorus]
Burning fire with hail
Can we exist outside this tale
You say I'm wrong but we're both to blame
Was it always a mistake
All structure was defiled
Can we re blur that line
Tides rise make wildfires
We set the ocean on fire
We set the ocean on fire
We set the ocean on fire

[Outro]
We set the ocean on fire
We set the ocean on fire
We set the ocean on fire
We set the ocean on fire
We set the ocean on fire
We set the ocean on fire

songs.title: Roads To Nowhere
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Walking away from you
Sidewalk gleam beneath the moon
And all my dreams are left behind
Back where you are stuck in my mind

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't have a reason to come back
Got a hope a dance and no plans
And I don't know if I'll be coming back
And tonight tonight tonight

[Chorus]
I'll be walking down the roads to nowhere
Running away from a life I couldn't bear
And I hope you're happy now that I'm not there
Yeah I'll be walking running walking the roads to nowhere

[Verse 2]
Street signs pass like old regrets
Ash in my lungs from a thousand cigarettes
I chased your ghost through every town

[Pre-Chorus]
But the further I got the more I drowned
And I don't have a reason to come back
Got no gods a chance and no plans
And I don't know if I'll be coming back
And tonight tonight tonight

[Chorus]
I'll be walking down the roads to nowhere
Running away from a life I couldn't bear
And I hope you're happy now that I'm not there
Yeah I'll be walking running walking the roads to nowhere

[Bridge]
Maybe I'll find peace in a diner at dawn
Trading words with strangers just moving on
Maybe one day I'll stop and stare
But tonight tonight tonight

[Chorus]
I'll be walking down the roads to nowhere
Running away from a life I couldn't bear
And I'll be walking down the roads to nowhere
Running away from a life I couldn't bear
And I hope you're happy now that I'm not there
Yeah I'll be walking running walking the roads to nowhere

songs.title: Turn On A Light
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Oh no I looped it again
Played back your voice
Til it broke in the end
Oh no I glitched again
Opened the code
Just to crash like then

[Chorus]
Turn on a light for me
I'm lost in the static I'm breaking in echoes
Just turn on a light for me
I can't see the sunrise I'm drowning in shadows
Please turn a light on for me
Oh for me

[Verse 2]
Oh no I'm wired again
Trapped in the loop
Of a dream I pretend
Oh no I'm fading again
The signal is weak
Don't know where I end

[Chorus]
Turn on a light for me
I'm lost in the static I'm breaking in echoes
Just turn on a light for me
I can't see the sunrise I'm drowning in shadows
Please turn a light on for me
Oh for me

songs.title: Golden Hour
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Light spills like honey on your skin
And I'm staring like the world might end
Caught between the silence and the sin
I trace your shadow knowing it won't bend

The gold is soft but the truth is steel
You're close enough that I can't feel
We're framed like a painting no one signed
Still holding hands pretending we're fine

[Chorus]
Golden hour but the sun don't care
We're stranded in a moment that ain't fair
You look like hope with your wild stare
But I can't stay and you're still there
No we can't go back to what we were
Trapped in beauty bound by hurt
It's the end of us dressed in flare
Golden hour and we're going nowhere

[Verse 2]
Your mouth says stay your eyes say leave
We kiss like ghosts who still believe
Time cracked open light leaks through
But no amount of glow can fix the truth

We built a house from falling leaves
It burned so soft we didn't even grieve
Now every laugh sounds like regret
And every touch is a silhouette

[Chorus]
Golden hour but the sun don't care
We're stranded in a moment that ain't fair
You look like hope with your wild stare
But I can't stay and you're still there
No we can't go back to what we were
Trapped in beauty bound by hurt
It's the end of us dressed in flare
Golden hour and we're going nowhere

[Bridge]
Golden hour our last disguise
Painted love in goodbye skies
Can't fix a soul with firelight
Can't make wrong ever feel right

So stay here with me just for the view
Even if we both know it's through
Golden hour one last glare
Of something perfect we couldn't bear

[Outro]
Gold gold gold
But it's cold cold cold
Golden hour
And now we let go

songs.title: Love Is An Ocean
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I'm weighing it up while you're pulling me down
Caught in the current no way out now
Falling too fast but you're not around
Still taste the salt of the words we drowned

[Pre-Chorus]
I'm crashing into your ocean blue
But now I know I'm not meant for you

[Chorus]
Love is an ocean love is an ocean
Drifting apart lost in the motion
Love is an ocean love is an ocean
Pulling me under but you're getting further

[Verse 2]
Diving too deep but you're out of reach
Your waves pulled away left me lost at sea
The ocean has arms but they don't feel like you
If love is an ocean I'm sinking into the truth

[Pre-Chorus]
I'm crashing into your ocean blue
But now I know I'm not meant for you

[Chorus]
Love is an ocean love is an ocean
Drifting apart lost in the motion
Love is an ocean love is an ocean
Pulling me under but you're getting further

[Breakdown]
Take me under take me whole
Let the tide break what's left of my soul
If love is water let it go
No use swimming against the flow

[Chorus]
Love is an ocean love is an ocean
Drifting apart lost in the motion
Love is an ocean love is an ocean
Pulling me under but you're getting further

[Final Chorus]
Love is an ocean love is an ocean
Waves crash around us lost in the moment
Love is an ocean love is an ocean
Pulling me deeper but you keep on floating

[Outro]
Take me under take me whole
Let the tide break what's left of my soul
Love is an ocean love is an ocean

songs.title: Nothing quite like a heart
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Woke up in the rush of a static sky
Truth's a whisper no one can clarify
Drifting where the light starts tearing apart
Moving past the phantoms of the dark

[Pre-Chorus]
Fever dreams of you still burn
Even silence takes a turn
Deadly touches light the match
Absence scratches leaves attached

[Chorus]
Nothing quite like a heart are are are are
Nothing quite like a heart are are are are
Nothing quite like a heart are are are are
Nothing quite like a

[Verse 2]
Left behind in rooms where time won't breathe
Echoes twist but never leave
Gravity's gone rogue again
Crashing through the calm I held within

[Pre-Chorus]
Fever dreams of you still burn
Even silence takes a turn
Deadly touches light the match
Absence scratches leaves attached

[Chorus]
Nothing quite like a heart are are are are
Nothing quite like a heart are are are are
Nothing quite like a heart are are are are
Nothing quite like a

Nothing quite like a heart are are are are
Nothing quite like a heart are are are are
Nothing quite like a heart are are are are
Nothing quite like a

[Outro]
Are are are are
Nothing quite like a heart
Nothing quite like a heart

songs.title: Parallel Lines
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Bare feet on the wooden beams
Cracks in the silence hearts in between
You walk just left of me same speed
Like we know where it ends but we still believe

Hands close enough to brush
But we don't like touching would mean too much
We move through gold and rust
Train track quiet and gentle trust

[Chorus]
Parallel lines running side by side
Never touching but too close to hide
We're walking slow through borrowed time
Waiting for the moment our paths unwind
No signs no signs
Just the ache of parallel lines

[Verse 2]
You hum a tune I used to know
Low and sweet like a farewell show
The sun dips low behind the pine
Like it knows it's almost time

You smile at me small and sad
And I smile back it's all we have
This stretch of track this quiet grace
A world where we still share a place

[Chorus]
Parallel lines running side by side
Never touching but too close to hide
We're walking slow through borrowed time
Waiting for the moment our paths unwind
No signs no signs
Just the ache of parallel lines

[Bridge]
Maybe one day your track will veer
And I'll keep walking like you're still near
And you'll glance back from a different line
Wishing we'd broken all design
But not today not right now
For now we've still got this somehow
This fragile fucked up perfect thread
Holding on by what's unsaid

[Outro]
Parallel lines drawing fate in sand
No stops no maps just hand in hand
Each step a prayer a borrowed rhyme
Before the curves that steel you from mine
No signs no signs
Just the hush of parallel lines

songs.title: Satellite
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
You always talked like the moon was your mirror
Said you saw your soul in the sky
I just sat quiet in the passenger seat
Trying to think of something kind

You were chasing some kind of freedom
I was chasing the shape of your light
Two hearts out of rhythm
But damn we still burned bright

[Chorus]
Now I'm your satellite
Caught in your gravity
I drift through every night
Still waiting patiently
You don't see me but I
Still glow when you pass by
I'm your satellite
Just spinning in your sky

[Verse 2]
There was magic in motel ceilings
In the way you'd hum to the dark
I never learned how to leave things easy
Never knew how to un-love that hard

We were thunder with no rain coming
Just heat that couldn't hold
But I'd go through all that static again
Just to hear your voice on the radio

[Chorus]
Now I'm your satellite
Caught in your gravity
I drift through every night
Still aching quietly
You don't see me but I
Still orbit your goodbye
I'm your satellite
Just waiting on your light

[Bridge]
Call me back from the dark
Call me when you're alone
I'm still tuned to your heart
Still dialing your tone

[Outro]
I'm your satellite
Out here undefined
But I'd stay in your orbit
If it means you're still mine
I'm your satellite
Fading out in time
Still yours
Somewhere in the skyline

songs.title: In Between (I Will Find You)
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
There are monsters in the shadows they drain the pulpits to survive
I offered up my heart to them just to find it brutalized
I hold on to the lovers I hold them in my eyes
Hoping praying maybe someday they'll exist outside my mind

[Pre-Chorus]
In binary echos
In the lines and the dots
In the numeral slots
In binary echos
In the lightning and the dust
In the path that's untouched

[Chorus]
I will find you
I will find you
In between
Shadows
In between
I will find you

[Verse 2]
Weathered storms and trenches compiled all we are
Hold on to the memories right before you lose your heart
In the burning old remnant of the world we knew before
Shadows lingering with limbs wrapped around our nucleus

[Pre-Chorus]
In binary echos
In the lines and the dots
In the numeral slots
In binary echos
In the lighting and the rust
In tracks that are long lost

[Chorus]
I will find you
I will find you
In between
Shadows
In between
I will find you

[Outro]
In between
Shadows
In between
I will find you
In between
Shadows
In between
I will find you

songs.title: Want To Hold
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Met you in the quiet in the place between
Where the sky looked tired and the streets were free
You saw through the noise through the cracks in me
Now I'm chasing spirits in the places we'd be
You were light in my doubt fire in the freeze
Now it's cold coffee and thread bare sheets
Still I keep a seat in all my memories
Hoping maybe someday you'll come back to me

[Chorus]
Wherever I am wherever I go I hope that we will still cross roads
Whoever I am whoever I hold I hope that oh that you still know
You're all of my gold inside my bones everything I want to hold

[Verse 2]
Every streetlamp flails like it knows our names
The night air's black crashing in the pain
I wear your shadow like a second skin
Everywhere I go you've already been
I never sung songs I never played
All the almosts haunt me from in this grave
Tried to outrun it but the past runs fast
And your phantom's driving through my underpass

[Chorus]
Wherever I am wherever I go I hope that we will still cross roads
Whoever I am whoever I hold I hope that oh that you still know
You're all of my gold inside my bones everything I want to hold
You're all that I know help me to grow everything I want to hold

[Bridge]
I still keep your name like a secret between teeth
Say it softly when no one can see
Left the light on like you might still need it
Like the door might open like I still believe it

[Chorus]
Wherever I am wherever I go I hope that we will still cross roads
Whoever I am whoever I hold I hope that oh that you still know
You're all of my gold inside my bones everything I want to hold
You're all that I know help me to grow everything I want to hold

[Outro]
I still walk that line where the sky gets thin
Still chasing the places we might've been
And if the world folds in if the colors bleed
I'll be waiting in the quiet where you first found me
